title: trifolium coarctatum
intro: Trifolium coarctatum, also known as the narrow-leaved clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Trifolium coarctatum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Trifolium coarctatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
